<img src="https://r2cdn.perplexity.ai/pplx-full-logo-primary-dark%402x.png" style="height:64px;margin-right:32px"/>

# \# Data Flow – Contact360

## Flow 1: Contact Creation

UI → API Gateway → CRM Service → PostgreSQL
↓
Event Bus → OpenSearch Index

---

## Flow 2: Email Enrichment

User CSV → Storage Service → Job Queue (Redis)
→ Email Service → Generate Emails
→ Save to DB + Return CSV

---

## Flow 3: AI Query

User → MCP → AI Service
↓
Fetch Data (CRM + OpenSearch + Vector DB)
↓
LLM → Response

---

## Flow 4: Campaign Execution

Campaign Service → Scheduler → Channel Services
→ Email / WhatsApp / SMS
→ Track engagement → DB

---

## Flow 5: Extension Flow

Extension → Scrape Data → Backend API
→ CRM Service → DB + Search Index

Here are all **5 Contact360 data flow diagrams**, generated and ready to download. Here's a full breakdown of what each one maps out:

***

## Flow 1 — Contact Creation

A `POST /contacts` from the **Next.js UI** passes through **Kong API Gateway** (where `org_id` is injected from the JWT), hits the **CRM Service**, and writes to **PostgreSQL with RLS** for tenant isolation. The CRM service then publishes a `contact.created` event to **Kafka**, which fans out in parallel to: **Notification Service** (Slack/email alert to the rep), **Search Sync consumer** (OpenSearch upsert), and **AI Agent** (lead scoring + pgvector embedding). **Redis** caches the contact with a 5-min TTL and a WebSocket pushes the live update back to the UI.

***

![](data:image/png;base64,)

## Flow 2 — Email Enrichment Pipeline

A user uploads a CSV → **Storage Service** generates an S3 Presigned PUT → **Lambda** validates schema on upload → valid jobs are queued in **BullMQ (Redis)**. Workers run a **waterfall enrichment**: Pattern Engine (12 email patterns) → Hunter.io/Apollo (external APIs) → SMTP Verify → ZeroBounce. Each email row gets a confidence score, saved to **PostgreSQL**, exported as an output CSV via S3 Presigned GET, and the user is notified via email + in-app. Rate limiting uses Redis token buckets per org.

***

![](data:image/png;base64,)

## Flow 3 — AI Query (Hybrid RAG)

A natural language question enters **MCP** (which selects the LLM config), then hits the **AI Agent (LangGraph)**. The agent fires **parallel retrieval**: BM25 keyword search via **OpenSearch** + cosine similarity via **pgvector** + structured data from **CRM Service** + multi-source via **BQL Connector**. BM25 and vector hits are merged by **Reciprocal Rank Fusion (RRF)**, and the top-K context is passed to **LLM (GPT-4o)** for grounded, cited generation. The output includes both a structured answer and optional tool action calls.

***

![](data:image/png;base64,)

## Flow 4 — Campaign Execution \& Tracking

**Campaign Service** defines a sequence → **BullMQ Scheduler** creates cron-triggered jobs → **BQL Audience** builds the segment → jobs are dispatched to **Email (SendGrid/SES)**, **WhatsApp (Meta Business API)**, and **SMS (Twilio/MSG91)** — with a **DND Guard** checking the TRAI registry (Redis-cached for 24h) before SMS/WhatsApp sends. Engagement events (open via pixel, click via redirect proxy, reply via inbound webhook) are captured and published to **Kafka `email.*` topics**, consumed by **Analytics** (stats update) and the **Sequence Engine** (trigger next step).

***

![](data:image/png;base64,)

## Flow 5 — Chrome Extension Enrichment

On user click, the **MV3 Content Script** parses the LinkedIn public DOM → structured data is passed to the **Service Worker** → `POST /enrich` with JWT to the **API Gateway** → **CRM Service** creates the contact and fans out **parallel enrichment jobs**: Email Service (waterfall enrich+verify), Phone Service (enrich+DND check), AI Agent (score+embed). Results are written to **PostgreSQL** (with full audit log: userId, sourceUrl, timestamp, fields — GDPR compliant), **OpenSearch** (contact indexed), and **pgvector** (embedding stored). Results stream back via **SSE to the Sidebar UI** in real-time, exactly like Truecaller-style live profile enrichment.

![](data:image/png;base64,)
